name: PLAY IT LOUD! HOW TORONTO GOT SOUL
description: ★ Rating: 7/10 Artistic Merit: Solid, anchored by strong archival material and a clear narrative focus on Jay Douglas. ✨ Originality: 7/10 — The story of Jamaican music’s underrecognized role in 1960s–70s Toronto is fresh ground, though the biography-document…
